scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix backend/hotel-service && npm install --prefix backend/comments-service && npm install --prefix backend/notification-service && npm install --prefix backend/ai-agent-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend/hotel-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/comments-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/ai-agent-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/gateway" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
